div.h1: Raft Subsystem: Snapshot Trigger & Log Compaction
div.p:
Component: Storage/Log Manager
Protocol Phase: Append-Only Log Maintenance

ol.li: Persistence Order: Snapshot file is guaranteed on disk (fsync) before the Log is truncated.
Recovery Invariant: On crash during truncation, the reboot recovery logic detects that lastIncludedIndex in the snapshot is greater than the log's start index and resolves the overlap.
Zero-Copy Optimization: Pointers are swapped in memory only after Step 5 returns success.
